description: Generates compression report with token and byte metrics
command: node dist/cli.mjs context compress --input tmp/evals/compression-test.md --output tmp/evals/compression-report.json
setup: mkdir -p tmp/evals && echo 'This is a test document with some content that can be compressed. It has multiple sentences and paragraphs to test the compression algorithm.' > tmp/evals/compression-test.md
